<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PhpParser\Node\Stmt; use PhpParser\Node\Identifier; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt; class Goto_ extends Stmt { /** @var Identifier Name of label to jump to */ public Identifier $name; /** * Constructs a goto node. * * @param string|Identifier $name Name of label to jump to * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes Additional attributes */ public function __construct($name, array $attributes = []) { $this->attributes = $attributes; $this->name = \is_string($name) ? new Identifier($name) : $name; } public function getSubNodeNames(): array { return ['name']; } public function getType(): string { return 'Stmt_Goto'; } }
